title: After the Tenno Sho (Spring): Someone to Learn From

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With Mejiro Ryan emerging victorious after a
white-hot spring Tenno Sho, Ines Fujin is left
feeling deeply frustrated.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Meanwhile, instead of savoring her victory,
Mejiro Ryan faces her fans and offers them her
heartfelt thanks. She's the vision of a dignified
racer to whom expectations are no stranger.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ines watches closely. Sensing that Mejiro Ryan is
on another level from her, she begins to seriously
consider the way she engages with her supporters.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In part to determine whether she has what it takes
to reach Ryan's level, Ines decides to throw
herself into training for the Takarazuka Kinen!
